profile.heading: Profile
profile.displayNameTaken: This display name is already taken

security.heading: Verify identity
security.verifyHint: A verification code will be sent to your email before making changes
security.codeRequired: Enter the verification code from your email
security.verified: Identity verified — you can now make changes
security.emailConfirmationSent: Confirmation email sent to your new address
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

linkedAccounts.heading: Linked accounts
linkedAccounts.cannotUnlinkLast: Cannot remove your only sign-in method

exportData.heading: Export data
exportData.description: Download a complete copy of all your data in JSON format.

resetData.heading: Reset data
resetData.description: Selectively clear your data without deleting your account. This cannot be undone.

scopeDesc.all: Clear all data and start fresh

confirm.conversations: This will permanently delete all your conversations and messages. Continue?
confirm.memory: This will erase everything Kernel has learned about you. Continue?
confirm.knowledge: This will remove all knowledge graph entities and their connections. Continue?
confirm.goals: This will delete all your goals and progress tracking. Continue?
confirm.preferences: This will reset your briefings and metadata preferences. Continue?
confirm.all: This will clear ALL your data — conversations, memory, knowledge, goals, and preferences. Your account and subscription remain intact. Continue?

voice.heading: Voice
voice.ttsVoiceHint: Choose the voice for text-to-speech responses
voice.proRequired: Upgrade to Pro for voice conversation mode

danger.heading: Account
danger.signOutDesc: Sign out of your account on this device
danger.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data
